untranslatable_reason: This strategy requires cross-sectional ranking (percentile-based selection across a universe of stocks) and dynamic portfolio rebalancing monthly. The allowed indicators are designed for single-instrument technical analysis and do not include percentile ranking, universe filtering, or multi-stock ranking mechanics. The core logic depends on: (1) computing 12-month returns for all stocks, (2) ranking them cross-sectionally, (3) selecting top/bottom deciles dynamically each month. Standard technical indicators cannot express this ranking operation. Implementation requires a portfolio engine with ranking/sorting capabilities external to the indicator-based rule system.
translation_notes: Signal represents a classic Jegadeesh-Titman momentum anomaly strategy requiring cross-sectional stock ranking that exceeds the scope of single-stock technical rule translation. The 'returns' indicator can track individual stock performance, but cannot execute the percentile thresholding or monthly rebalancing logic needed for decile-based position sizing across a universe.
